comment: Universal-shape ADR for the component-library decision (C7) with stack_adr_ref linkage.

adr.title: Use shadcn/ui component library
adr.context: React stack chosen in tech_stack ADR. Need a component library that scales with the design tokens we will emit in phase 5.
adr.decision: OPT-A shadcn/ui — copy-paste components on top of Radix + Tailwind.
adr.consequences: Components live in our repo, fully tweakable; no NPM upgrade churn; bundle sized to what we use.

options_considered.name: shadcn/ui
options_considered.rationale_for: Source-controlled; matches Tailwind stack; no runtime lock-in.
options_considered.rationale_against: Manual component upkeep when upstream ships fixes.

options_considered.name: Material UI (MUI)
options_considered.rationale_against: Heavy bundle; opinionated emotion runtime; harder to theme to brand.

options_considered.name: Mantine
options_considered.rationale_against: Custom CSS-in-JS layer separate from our Tailwind tokens.

adr.falsification_signal: If we ship 3 missions and find ourselves rewriting >40% of shadcn components, revisit toward MUI.
